summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex platform new features. Backend APIs: 91% success (20/22 tests). Frontend: All core features verified working. Two issues found - TTS service blocked by ElevenLabs (external limitation) and role management permission check bug.

minor.issue: ElevenLabs free tier blocked - 'Unusual activity detected' error. External service limitation, not code issue.
Owner account has role='admin' but is_owner=true, causing role assignment to fail with 403 because target_level >= current_level check fails. Owner role should be 'owner' not 'admin'.

ui_bugs.issue: Click interception issue - parent div intercepts click events on toggle checkbox. Works with force=True but may need z-index fix.

passed_tests: Homepage loads with RTL Arabic interface
Login/logout flow working correctly
Token cleared from localStorage on logout
Protected routes redirect to login after logout
Admin dashboard shows all statistics
Image Generator page with Generate tab working
Image Generator Edit tab with upload area working
Video Generator page loads correctly
Voice toggle and options visible in video generator
Admin Clients page shows user list with 10 users
Admin Clients - Activity button expands user activity log
Admin Clients - Role dropdown for changing user roles
Admin Clients - Add credits and free trials buttons working
Admin Clients - Deactivate/Activate buttons present
Admin Activity page shows 22 activities
Admin Activity - Search and filter working correctly
Admin Activity - Filter by image shows 2 image-related activities
API /api/voices - Returns list of 9+ voices
API /api/images/edit - Successfully adds text to images
API /api/admin/activity - Returns activity logs
API /api/admin/users/{id}/activity - Returns user-specific activities
API /api/generate/image - Image generation working
API /api/generate/video - Video generation with voice options working
action_items: MEDIUM: Fix owner account role - owner@zitex.com has role='admin' instead of 'owner', causing role management permissions to fail
LOW: Fix voice toggle click interception in VideoGenerator - add proper z-index to checkbox element
INFO: ElevenLabs TTS free tier is blocked - consider upgrading to paid plan or informing users
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 1131-1143: Role update logic checks ROLE_LEVELS but owner account has role='admin' instead of 'owner', breaking the permission check
The owner account in DB should have role='owner' to match ROLE_LEVELS hierarchy (owner=100, super_admin=80, admin=50, client=10)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Routes for image/video generators are /dashboard/images and /dashboard/videos (not /generate/image). Owner account has is_owner=true but role='admin' which causes role management issues. ElevenLabs TTS free tier is blocked. WhatsApp notification is MOCKED (uses CallMeBot placeholder).
rca_of_the_issue: Role management 403 error: The owner account (owner@zitex.com) has role='admin' in the database instead of role='owner'. The update_user_role function at line 1129-1160 checks if target_level >= current_level before allowing role changes. Since owner's current_role is 'admin' (level 50), they cannot assign 'admin' role to other users because 50 >= 50. Fix: Update owner account to have role='owner' in the database.
